description:
Handle MDI case lifecycle events and mirror the minimum status Apoth needs for onboarding, dashboard, and billing gates.

**Scope**
- Implement handlers for case created/assigned/processing/completed/declined/cancelled or the actual event names from T-052.
- Drop stale events using provider timestamps where available.
- Update DynamoDB case status and evidence records only.
- Trigger billing unlock workflow only when the event contract from T-078 says it is safe.

**Acceptance**
- Fixture replay updates case status deterministically.
- Out-of-order stale event does not regress status.
- Completed/approved event can unlock billing exactly once and only when T-078 rules pass.
title: MDI case-lifecycle webhook handlers
